selected_dialects.reason: Radially-varying axial thickness profile (hub thick → web thin → rim thick) requires ordered R-Z polyline revolve. Axisymmetric dialect uses revolve_profile with Z-sorted stations and cannot express thickness-by-radius cross-sections.
Turbine disk base body (revolved profile) plus 60 fir-tree slot cuts requires boolean_cut and circular_pattern_component across independent bodies/features.

selected_domain_skills.reason: Domain-aware R-Z profile definition for hub-web-rim thickness variation with fillet transitions.
Multi-stage fir-tree slot profile with alternating neck/lobe stations, flank angles, and fillet radii; circular pattern on rim OD.

unsupported_capabilities: arbitrary_ordered_RZ_revolve_polygon_with_thickness_by_radius_disk_profile (axisymmetric dialect revolve_profile sorts Z-stations and cannot express varying-thickness cross-sections; sketch_profile may partially cover but exact fir-tree multi-lobe profile with alternating neck/lobe stations, flank angles, and independent fillet radii per corner is not in the dialect op set)

fir_tree_slot_v2 with alternating neck/lobe stations, independent flank_angle per lobe, per-corner fillet_radius, and slot_depth measured radially from rim OD (current rim_slot parameters in axisymmetric_turbine_disk primitive use single neck_width/lobe_width/lobe_depth which cannot express the requested three-stage fir-tree: first neck → first lobe pair → second neck → second lobe pair → third neck → root fillet)
geometry_postcheck enforcing closed=true, is_valid_solid=true, body_count=1 (no dialect-level solid validation op available)
safety_notes: Non-flight, non-certified, non-manufacturing reference geometry only.

Fir-tree slot geometry generated by current dialects may be simplified; true multi-stage alternating neck/lobe fir-tree with independent flank angles and per-corner fillets exceeds available dialect capabilities.

Sketch_profile revolve can approximate the hub-web-rim thickness profile but the exact fir-tree slot specification (three neck/lobe stages with specific half-widths) cannot be fully honored by available dialects.
Output is reference concept only — no structural, thermal, or fatigue validity implied.
